# Log server performance test with ultra-aggressive timeouts

# Set ultra-aggressive timeouts
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=1s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=800ms
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=600ms

# Create performance test log
cat > perf.log << EOF
2024-01-01 10:00:01 INFO Quick test
2024-01-01 10:00:02 ERROR Fast error
EOF

bash 'timeout 300ms echo "Quick log test"'
stdout 'Quick log test'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f perf.log
